name: Find My Wiener
short_description: Embark on a ridiculous hunt for your runaway wiener across sprawling hand-drawn worlds, sling poop, trigger explosive power-ups, uncover silly secrets, and climb the leaderboards to prove you’re the ultimate wiener wrangler.
detailed_description:
"Find My Wiener" is a whimsical, hand-drawn adventure about one noble (and slightly ridiculous) quest: reuniting with your runaway wiener dog. This isn’t just any missing pet — it’s your four-legged best friend who’s gone off on an adventure of their own! Expect a mix of humor, heart, and the untamed thrill of the hunt. Are you ready to answer the call of the wild and find your wiener?

Explore Vast Landscapes

Journey across sprawling, hand-drawn biomes — from dense forests and pine groves to mushroom forests, open plains, and vibrant flower meadows. Every blade of grass sways in the wind, hiding surprises, secrets, and maybe… your elongated wiener.

Leaderboards & Achievements

Push your limits with new difficulties, challenge yourself to beat your best times, and climb the leaderboards to prove you’re the ultimate wiener wrangler. Along the way, unlock a growing list of quirky Steam achievements.

Power-Ups & Poop

Turn your search into controlled chaos with bizarre power-ups and equally ridiculous debuffs:

  • Eggplant Enhancement – Boosts your wiener’s size for better visibility.

  • Hotdog Toy – Points you toward your pup’s location.

  • Poop – Yes, you can poop.

  • Blue Balls Burst – Sends you soaring in random directions.

  • And many more strange surprises waiting to be discovered.

Cosmetics, Relics, & More

Blast through trees with fiery explosions, collect rare Relics that alter the rules of the world, and unlock cosmetics to jazz up your wiener. From silly crowns to hidden relic powers, secrets lurk around every corner to keep your journey unpredictable.
